column1: # AFGL (1986) US Standard atmosphere — water vapour profile (model 6).
# USSA 1976 is a DRY atmosphere; this AFGL companion supplies the H2O profile the CH4 LUT
#   background transmittance needs (per-layer H2O columns by integrating vmr over each
#   equal-mass layer's pressure span). z in km; p in mb (hPa); T in K; h2o_vmr in ppmv.
